content.text: in Claude (Settings → Connectors / Customize, or from the prompt screen in Cowork/Claude Code).
Open the connector directory from Settings.
Pick a service (e.g. Google Drive, Gmail, Calendar, Notion).
Authenticate and approve the requested scopes (read‑only, write/delete).
Optionally configure per‑tool permissions: always allow, require approval, or block.
content in those apps directly from natural language prompts (e.g. “Draft a reply to the last email from Alice in Gmail and save it as a draft”).
You can disconnect a connector or adjust permissions at any time from the same settings panel.
